name: Ultra Ask Concentration Wall (Contra)
hypothesis: Feedback on iter004_ask_conc_zscore_extreme (WR 90.9%) noted diminishing returns but recommended one final tightening. Pushing the z-score threshold to an extreme 4.0 will definitively test if an ultra-high-conviction subset exists, where an overwhelming ask wall almost guarantees a downward price reversion.
mutation_note: Following feedback recommendation to 'tighten_threshold'. This is the final tightening step, increasing z-score from 3.5 to 4.0 to isolate the most extreme cases.
